{{tmbox
 |name=wikidata-entry
 |type=notice
 |image=[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|30px]]
 |small=yes
 |smallimage=[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|20px]]
 |smalltext=This {{pagetype}} is linked to its entry on [[Wikidata]]: {{q|{{{1}}}}}.
}}[[da:{{{1}}}]]<includeonly>
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
